classificationPolicy.IMPLEMENTED_AND_VERIFIED: Persistent implementation and automated exact-head evidence exist inside the stated maturity boundary.
classificationPolicy.IMPLEMENTED_NOT_OPERATIONALLY_PROVEN: Implementation and test tooling exist, but target production-like operation has not been measured.
classificationPolicy.PARTIAL: Only part of the required capability or proof exists.
classificationPolicy.FAIL_CLOSED: The capability is deliberately unavailable until a trusted dependency or separate acceptance exists.
classificationPolicy.BLOCKED_BY_EXTERNAL_ADMIN: Completion requires an external administrative control unavailable to repository code.
classificationPolicy.NOT_IMPLEMENTED: No qualifying implementation or accepted topology exists.
classificationPolicy.DUPLICATE_AUTHORITY: More than one mutable source of truth is reachable in one release mode.
classificationPolicy.LEGACY: Retired behavior still affects the executable or release graph.
classificationPolicy.NO_GO: A mandatory acceptance block has failed or lacks evidence.

capabilities.name: Release status and obsolete deployment integrations
capabilities.finding: The exact main head still receives four failed Vercel statuses and one failed Deno deployment status; repository code cannot disable external publishers safely.
capabilities.nextGate: An administrator must remove the obsolete GitHub Apps, webhooks or deployment integrations, verify rulesets, then open a fresh control PR and retain combined-status evidence.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Repository audit only; external GitHub administration is not changed programmatically.

capabilities.name: Persistent authentication, sessions and MFA
capabilities.finding: Persistent sessions, one-time refresh rotation, revocation and MFA have PostgreSQL-backed automated evidence.
capabilities.nextGate: Retain the gate and include the same paths in production-like security acceptance and soak monitoring.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Implementation and PostgreSQL CI verification; no production operational claim.

capabilities.name: Membership RBAC, RLS and tenant isolation
capabilities.finding: The canonical Deal path derives role and tenant from server authority and has PostgreSQL tenant-isolation evidence.
capabilities.nextGate: Expand negative authorization coverage to every public command and object endpoint under production-like topology.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Implementation and CI verification; full operational security acceptance remains open.

capabilities.name: Canonical Deal command core
capabilities.finding: Business state, audit, outbox, idempotency and monetary effects use the canonical PostgreSQL command path with version compare-and-swap.
capabilities.nextGate: Prove the complete autonomous Deal cycle in production-like infrastructure across standard, partial and dispute scenarios.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Code-level transaction authority and CI evidence only.

capabilities.name: Auction execution and atomic award
capabilities.finding: Atomic close, deterministic winner, concurrent command handling, restart replay and one canonical Deal are covered by an exact-head PostgreSQL 16 gate.
capabilities.nextGate: Carry the same invariants into sustained auction load and chaos tests in the production-like environment.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Exact-head PostgreSQL 16 acceptance; not operationally proven at target load.

capabilities.name: Logistics, receiving and acceptance lifecycle
capabilities.authority: PostgreSQL through the Deal command pipeline
capabilities.finding: Assignment, transit, arrival, weight and acceptance persist, but replacement, overlap, outage and restart matrices are incomplete.
capabilities.nextGate: Add carrier replacement, driver overlap, duplicate arrival, partial delivery and recovery tests as one authority slice.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Core implementation exists; operational and concurrency proof is incomplete.

capabilities.name: Laboratory lifecycle and evidence binding
capabilities.finding: Laboratory state is persistent and exercised through PostgreSQL authority, supersede rules and full Deal lifecycle tests.
capabilities.nextGate: Add production-like object storage, quarantine and repeated-laboratory operational evidence.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: PostgreSQL implementation and CI verification only.

capabilities.name: Documents and immutable evidence
capabilities.authority: PostgreSQL metadata with incomplete object-storage authority
capabilities.finding: Document metadata and event binding exist, but immutable retention, malware quarantine, signed access isolation and object restore are not proven.
capabilities.nextGate: Implement and accept S3-compatible versioning or object lock, quarantine, download authorization, audit and restore reconciliation.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Metadata path is verified; binary evidence custody is not operationally accepted.

capabilities.name: Settlement ledger and signed callback simulator
capabilities.authority: PostgreSQL append-only ledger and cryptographically verified internal test provider
capabilities.finding: Reserve and release use integer minor units, signed idempotent callbacks and reconciliation without claiming live bank connectivity.
capabilities.nextGate: Run callback storms, restart during settlement and reconciliation under production-like load while live providers remain fail closed.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Internal test authority only; no live bank, nominal account or real-money claim.

capabilities.name: Dispute lifecycle, Deal freeze and split outcome
capabilities.finding: RLS, party authority, evidence chain, appeal, Deal freeze, settlement hold, split outcome, restart replay and rollback are exact-head gated.
capabilities.nextGate: Exercise the complete dispute cycle in production-like Deal E2E, target load and worker failure conditions.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Exact-head PostgreSQL 16 acceptance; no operational soak proof.

capabilities.name: Atomic audit and durable outbox
capabilities.finding: The competing relay is removed; lease token, heartbeat, stale-token rejection, retry, dead-letter and audited redrive use PostgreSQL authority. A dedicated worker process now delivers through a least-privilege app_outbox principal.
capabilities.nextGate: Prove backlog recovery SLA, poison isolation and independent scaling in a deployed production-like Kubernetes environment.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Durable implementation plus exact-head PostgreSQL and two-process acceptance; no deployed Kubernetes worker proof.

capabilities.name: Independent outbox worker topology
capabilities.authority: PostgreSQL outbox_entries through dedicated app_outbox worker process
capabilities.finding: A dedicated non-HTTP Nest process, non-root distroless image and two-replica immutable-digest Helm workload are implemented. Exact-head acceptance proves app_outbox least privilege, two OS processes, PostgreSQL leases, Kafka delivery, peer-kill failover, zero duplicate delivery in the clean scenario and graceful shutdown.
capabilities.nextGate: Deploy the exact image digest to production-like Kubernetes and prove two live pods, rolling deployment, peer kill, backlog recovery SLA and telemetry continuity.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Process, image and desired-state IaC accepted in CI; no Kubernetes runtime, cluster failure or operational soak claim.

capabilities.name: S3-compatible object storage and evidence custody
capabilities.finding: Local S3-compatible storage exists, but versioning, retention, object lock, quarantine, access isolation, backup and restore evidence are absent.
capabilities.nextGate: Define the production-like object storage authority and prove upload, quarantine, immutable retention, authorized access and restore.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Local development topology only.

capabilities.name: PostgreSQL high availability, pooler and PITR
capabilities.authority: Single PostgreSQL 16 instances in local and CI evidence
capabilities.finding: PostgreSQL authority and migrations are strong, but no HA cluster, connection pooler, WAL archive, PITR topology or measured failover exists.
capabilities.nextGate: Deploy PostgreSQL 16 HA with pooler and backup storage, then prove restart, failover, PITR, RPO and RTO in a clean environment.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Database authority is verified; high availability and operational recovery are not.

capabilities.name: Logs, metrics, traces, alerts and SLO telemetry
capabilities.authority: Application telemetry and local observability configuration
capabilities.finding: Telemetry and local collectors exist, but trace continuity, alert routing, ownership, escalation and SLO measurement are not production-like accepted.
capabilities.nextGate: Create the SLO definition, alert catalog and executable verification tests from request through worker, storage and settlement callback.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Implementation and partial automated tests; no operating observability service evidence.

capabilities.name: Target load and scalability acceptance
capabilities.finding: Load tooling exists, but 5000 sessions, 500 sustained RPS, 1000 RPS burst, 50000 Deals and 10 million events have not been measured.
capabilities.nextGate: Run Base, Target and Stress profiles on production-like infrastructure and retain latency, error, invariant and recovery evidence.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Harness implemented; target operational profile not executed.

capabilities.name: Failure injection and recovery acceptance
capabilities.finding: Lease recovery and selected races are tested, but process termination, network partition, database slowdown, disk pressure and storage timeout are incomplete.
capabilities.nextGate: Create deterministic chaos scenarios with invariant checks, alerts, measured recovery and no manual database repair.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Selected code-level failures verified; infrastructure failure acceptance absent.

capabilities.name: Backup, restore and disaster recovery
capabilities.finding: A database restore rehearsal exists, but encrypted retention, WAL/PITR, object recovery, clean-environment restore and measured RPO or RTO are not proven.
capabilities.nextGate: Run isolated full backup and restore including database and objects, record exact RPO/RTO and verify all Deal invariants.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: CI rehearsal only; disaster recovery is not operationally accepted.

capabilities.name: Blocking security gates and abuse evidence
capabilities.finding: Semgrep, container, repository-secret, IaC, dependency and abuse gates are blocking, but full operational security acceptance is not complete.
capabilities.nextGate: Run the complete cross-tenant, callback, refresh-token, MFA, upload, admin, redrive, database-principal and object-access matrix on production-like infrastructure.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Release security controls implemented; no independent production-like security acceptance or pentest claim.

capabilities.name: Production-like infrastructure and deployment
capabilities.finding: API and web definitions include replicas and probes but still use mutable image tags. The outbox worker now has an immutable-digest workload and exact-head process/image acceptance, while database HA, pooler, backup, environment deployment and rollback proof remain absent.
capabilities.nextGate: Create immutable digest promotion for API and web, migration gate, production-like environment overlays, deployed smoke, worker runtime acceptance and rollback evidence.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Desired-state IaC and worker process/image acceptance only; no production-like deployment has been proven.

capabilities.name: Browser, RU EN ZH and accessibility acceptance
capabilities.finding: The Design System v8 browser and accessibility matrix is merged without claiming production operation.
capabilities.nextGate: Retain the matrix and add production-like command conflict, outage and degraded-mode journeys.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Browser CI acceptance; no real operational user soak.

capabilities.name: Bank, state and document provider boundaries
capabilities.authority: Disabled adapters and cryptographically verified internal test providers
capabilities.finding: Live bank, state, EDI, EPD and identity providers are outside this boundary and must remain disabled or fail closed; sandbox is not production authority.
capabilities.nextGate: Keep live adapters disabled throughout autonomous acceptance and perform separate provider acceptance only after contracts and credentials exist.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: External integrations explicitly excluded; no fake-live claim.

capabilities.name: Commit-bound release evidence index
capabilities.finding: Exact-head artifacts exist, including worker process and image evidence, but no single manifest binds tests, scans, load, failure, restore, image digests, deployment and rollback to one environment.
capabilities.nextGate: Build an immutable evidence index keyed by commit, environment, command, duration, result, thresholds and artifact digest.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Fragmented CI evidence; no complete release dossier.

capabilities.name: Operational runbooks and independent validation
capabilities.finding: Documentation exists, but deployment, rollback, migration, restore, incident, access, secret and capacity runbooks have not been independently executed as a complete set.
capabilities.nextGate: Create the required runbook set and validate each through a separate operator or isolated test agent with retained evidence.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Documentation fragments only; independent execution not proven.

capabilities.name: 72-hour, 14-day and 30-day operational soak
capabilities.finding: No evidence exists for the required soak, 100 full-cycle Deals or repeated recovery drills.
capabilities.nextGate: Start soak only after production-like topology, HA, load, failure, security, observability and runbook gates are green.
capabilities.maturityBoundary: Not started; cannot be compressed into CI or inferred from code.
